name: manual
title: Manual
description: A documentation theme built like an engineering handbook: numbered section index in a persistent sidebar, a title-block breadcrumb on every page, and prev/next sequence links. Cool gray paper, process-blue links, one amber wayfinding marker. Signature: you always know exactly where you are.

tokens.--font-ui: all interface and body text (system sans stack)
tokens.--color-panel: raised panels: sidebar blocks, code, callouts, pager cards
tokens.--color-accent: links, focus rings, interactive hover states
tokens.--color-signal: the amber wayfinding marker: current section, callout edges
tokens.--color-border: quiet edges around panels and table rows
tokens.--color-border-strong: structural rules: masthead, title block, table headers
tokens.--radius: corner rounding on panels and chips
tokens.--rule: width of structural rules and markers
